hints.METAPHOR: Direct comparison without using like or as
hints.PERSONIFICATION: Giving human traits to non-human things
hints.ALLITERATION: Repetition of the same starting sound
hints.ASSONANCE: Repetition of vowel sounds in nearby words
hints.ONOMATOPOEIA: A word that imitates a sound (buzz, pop)
hints.RHYME: Words ending with the same sound
hints.PLOT: The sequence of events in a story
hints.SETTING: Where and when a story takes place
hints.CHARACTER: A person or being in a story
hints.THEME: The main idea or message of a story
hints.SITUATIONAL: When the outcome is the opposite of what's expected
hints.DRAMATIC: When the audience knows something the character doesn't
hints.VERBAL: Saying the opposite of what you mean (like sarcasm)
hints.COSMIC: When fate or the universe seems to mock our plans
